text:
To find the next lexicographic permutation, you need to identify the first decreasing element from the right and swap it with the smallest element to its right that is greater than it.
```python
def next_permutation(xs):
    i = len(xs) - 2
    while i >= 0 and xs[i] >= xs[i + 1]:
        i -= 1
    if i < 0:
        xs.reverse()
        return None
    j = len(xs) - 1
    while xs[j] <= xs[i]:
        j -= 1
    xs[i], xs[j] = xs[j], xs[i]
    xs[i + 1:] = xs[i + 1:][::-1]
    return None
```
